case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1712 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6586/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 01.09.2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 20.11.2024. Even thereafter, Counsel for the Petitioner neither moved any application for urgent hearing nor made any efforts to proceed with the matter, which prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest. Resultantly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
